Notice And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings And Attorney Fees
Off Calendar Mar-19-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A. Motion for Judgment on the Pleadings and Attorney Fees. Appearances: Defendant Melorene M. Adriano appearing Pro Per and opposing party. Defendant in Pro Per failed to give notice, pursuant to San Francisco Local Rule 8.3. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion is granted, no opposition filed. Judgment to be entered in Plaintiff's favor forthwith. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
